mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM po_weekly_stats WHERE store_id = #{storeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO po_weekly_stats (store_id, base_week, total_po_count, total_po_amount) VALUES (#{storeId}, #{baseWeek}, #{totalPoCount}, #{totalPoAmount}) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE total_po_count = VALUES(total_po_count), total_po_amount = VALUES(total_po_amount)
